title: Checkpoints, Write-Ahead State, Crash Consistency, and Resume · Inference Brief: Inflight Recovery
summary: The process serializes mutable objects occasionally, writes in place, cannot distinguish complete from partial files, and resumes stale in-flight work as success. Predict authorization, URL identity, runtime admission, Promise ownership, resource bounds, accessibility impact, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the crawler ts inflight recovery increment in versioned crash-consistent crawl checkpoint. Learners progress through prediction, e…

Real DNS, Fetch, streams, Cheerio, Playwright, axe-core, files, processes, packages, containers, assistive-technology review, load, legal review, restore, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Return claimed or fetching items to an explicit retry state using attempt and idempotency rules after a crash.

For Authorized site auditing and TypeScript Defend the Inflight Recovery model · Theory Inflight Recove…, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: In-flight work should be marked complete to avoid duplicates.
